title: Quality Policy
content:
Quality Policy

QUALITY POLICY OF ISTANBUL ESENYURT UNIVERSITY

Istanbul Esenyurt University aims to be a practice-oriented institution that cultivates knowledgeable, competent, and entrepreneurial individuals capable of shaping the future through a liberal, interdisciplinary, and internationally standardized educational approach. In this endeavor, the University is committed to ensuring that scientific and technological advancements contribute meaningfully to society. The quality policy it adopts is based on the following fundamental principles:

- To provide a world-class education by equipping students with both academic knowledge and practical skills, while continuously enhancing and improving the learning experience.

- To consistently gather feedback in order to support students’ academic, social, and personal development, and to offer tailored solutions that best address their needs.

- To educate individuals who take responsibility for generating and disseminating new knowledge through innovation- and entrepreneurship-oriented projects, and to support research and development activities on a global scale.

- To enhance quality by maintaining regular communication with stakeholders—students, academic and administrative staff, alumni, the business community, and society at large—taking into account their views and expectations, encouraging their active participation in processes, and continuously monitoring their satisfaction.

- To ensure the quality of academic programs by aiming for national and international accreditations in education and research, and by consistently striving to align these processes with international quality standards.

- To contribute to social development by nurturing individuals who act with a strong sense of social responsibility and respect for ethical values, while also initiating projects that benefit society.

- To provide modern and accessible learning environments by actively integrating digital technologies into educational processes.

- To embrace data-driven decision-making and improve efficiency through digital transformation.

- To ensure the sustainable use of resources by adopting a continuous improvement and solution-oriented approach.

We, Istanbul Esenyurt University, hereby commit to establishing, implementing, and sustaining a comprehensive quality system that upholds these principles across our organization.

Prof. Dr. Süleyman ÖZDEMİR

President

This content was updated on 23/06/2025.
